essence: Shapes how a brand is seen, felt, and remembered through strategy, creativity, and data-driven execution.

identity.title: Marketing Manager
identity.summary: Plans and executes marketing strategies, manages campaigns, analyses performance, and guides brand communication across channels.

salary.notes: Tech, finance, and high-growth sectors often pay more. Senior brand or digital leads in London can exceed £90k-£110k.

qualifications: Degree in Marketing, Business, or Communications
Strong Understanding of Digital Marketing Channels
Ability to Analyse Data and Consumer Behaviour

lifestyle.description: Marketing managers live in a fast-moving blend of creativity, strategy, and constant iteration. Days often involve planning campaigns, reviewing content, analysing performance metrics, and coordinating with designers, writers, and product teams. The work can be high-pressure - deadlines, launches, and shifting priorities are common - and success depends on balancing bold ideas with data-driven decisions. The role is energising for people who enjoy storytelling, psychology, and the challenge of influencing how audiences think and feel. It suits individuals who thrive in dynamic environments, communicate clearly, and enjoy turning insights into compelling brand experiences.
